inputs.label: Projected Revenue at Exit
inputs.businessContext: The projected annual revenue of the startup at the time of exit (e.g., 5 years from now).

businessContext_i18n.en: The projected annual revenue of the startup at the time of exit (e.g., 5 years from now).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çıkış anında (örneğin, bugünden 5 yıl sonra) girişimin tahmini yıllık geliri.

inputs.label: Net Profit Margin
inputs.businessContext: Expected net profit margin at exit, expressed as a percentage.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected net profit margin at exit, expressed as a percentage.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çıkışta beklenen net kar marjı, yüzde olarak ifade edilir.

inputs.label: P/E Ratio
inputs.businessContext: Price-to-earnings ratio typical for comparable public companies in the sector.

businessContext_i18n.en: Price-to-earnings ratio typical for comparable public companies in the sector.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sektördeki benzer halka açık şirketler için tipik fiyat-kazanç oranı.

inputs.label: Required ROI
inputs.businessContext: Target return multiple for the investor (e.g., 3x means the investor aims to triple their investment).

businessContext_i18n.en: Target return multiple for the investor (e.g., 3x means the investor aims to triple their investment).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yatırımcı için hedef getiri katı (örneğin, 3x yatırımcının yatırımını üçe katlamayı hedeflediği anlamına gelir).

inputs.label: Investment Amount
inputs.businessContext: The amount of capital being invested in the startup.

businessContext_i18n.en: The amount of capital being invested in the startup.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
